title: TGaceAllStories
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: After bitcoin’s fall, pity those wildly enthusiastic investors who borrowed billions against crypto
items.description: The speculation that bitcoin would hit $200,000 in 2025 now seems like a dream. Because it was.

items.title: My husband, 73, wants to sell our $300K rental and buy an annuity. Is that wise?
items.description: “He believes the annuity will net $1,600 per month, the same as the rent from the house.”

items.title: My brother-in-law invested $30K in our California condo. It has a 3% mortgage rate. He’s pushing me to sell. Is now a good time?
items.description: “We’re only breaking even because of rising HOA fees in this state.”

items.title: ‘I’m not made of money’: My heating engineer didn’t fix my radiators on his first visit. Do I pay him a second time?
items.description: “He charged $180 for the second visit for his time, including $40 for the part.”
